_comment: Runtime configuration for the Live2D renderer. All values here are tuning knobs — changing them takes effect on the next renderer invocation with no C++ rebuild required.

breath._comment: Idle breathing animation. Each axis: offset (rest position), peak (amplitude), cycle (period in seconds), weight (blend contribution). Current values are post-#8 (52% amplitude reduction from original peaks of 15/8/10/4).

lipsync._comment: Rhubarb phoneme → mouth parameter mappings. open = MouthOpenY [0,1], form = MouthForm [-1,1].
lipsync._comment_smoothing: Blend weights written to mouth params each frame. Higher = more responsive, lower = smoother.

animation._comment_entry: breath_guard_entry_fade_duration: seconds to ramp breath suppression from 0→1 when a reaction starts. Fixes the one-frame head snap on reaction entry (issue #5).
animation._comment_exit: breath_guard_exit_fade_duration: seconds to ramp breath suppression from 1→0 after reaction ends.
animation._comment_prio: motion_priority_threshold: motion priority level that activates the breath guard (and is assigned to played reactions).

normalisation._comment: Out-of-range parameter correction. minimum_duration prevents instant snaps for tiny violations. auto_rate_multiplier scales max_breath_speed when normalise_rate=0. fallback_rate used when breath speed unavailable.

render._comment: scene_tail_duration: idle seconds appended after the last cue / lipsync event so the avatar settles.

ffmpeg._comment: Codec quality settings per output format. av1/prores for transparent output; h264 for opaque.
